channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: PWAs hit parity in 2026
item.description: Cut page weight 70% and cut server costs to zero with 2026 PWA APIs — Periodic Background Sync and File System Access finally work everywhere. Real production numbers included.

item.title: Platforms at 10, 100, 1k devs: the real stack
item.description: Platform cost per developer dropped 35% with quotas and Redis 7.2 — the real stack sizes, quotas, and failure modes in 2026.

item.title: 3 IaC tools in 2026: which one bites you first
item.description: Cut plan/apply time 23% with Pulumi in 2026 — benchmark results, state recovery times, and the real latency numbers every team should measure first.

item.title: AI memory loss: why your agent forgets everything
item.description: Cut AI context loss overnight by 90% with PostgreSQL memory store — 12 ms fetch latency, $18/month cost, and the session ID format that prevents forgetting in 2026.

item.title: Test AI code without testing the AI: 9 hard rules
item.description: Cut test flakiness 78% with property-based tests — Python 3.11, Hypothesis 6.94, and the property-first rule to avoid testing AI outputs

item.title: pgvector cut costs 80%: ditching Pinecone
item.description: Cut pgvector monthly costs 80% vs Pinecone — real benchmarks, schema, and the schema mistake I made first try. Compare latency, cost, and ops for 10M vectors in 2026.

item.title: AI SaaS solo: Builder vs Boilerplate in 2026
item.description: Cut SaaS time-to-market 50% with AI — Builder vs Boilerplate 2026: latency, cost, and the plugin trap most founders miss.

item.title: Serverless DB cold starts: Neon, PlanetScale, Turso
item.description: Cut serverless database latency 75% with Neon, PlanetScale, Turso — real 2026 numbers, connection pooling, DNS pinning, and the $32 VPC mistake most teams miss.

item.title: 3 side gigs developers use for $1.2k/mo in 2026
item.description: 3 side gigs developers use for $1.2k/month in Nairobi 2026 — Freelance APIs, code audits, AI fine-tuning — with concrete tools, benchmarks, and first-week steps

item.title: AI sales cycle: what changed for devtool founders
item.description: Trial-to-paid conversion fell 64% in 2025 — here’s how a devtool founder rebuilt the sales cycle around AI-native expectations and cut the cycle from 8 weeks to 3 weeks

item.title: Mobile money reconciliation traps that cost $5k/month
item.description: Cut mobile money reconciliation mismatches 93% with PostgreSQL state machines — timezone traps, duplicate webhooks, and provider idempotency keys that Paystack and Flutterwave won’t tell you.

item.title: Freelance platforms African devs tried in 2026
item.description: Find which dev platforms pay fastest and charge least in 2026 with concrete numbers and a free monitoring dashboard for African developers on Andela, Toptal, Arc, and Contra.

item.title: LLM apps: OWASP risks you missed
item.description: Implement OWASP Top 10 for LLM apps: prompt injection, insecure output, data leakage guardrails with Redis caching, Mistral 7B, and FastAPI/Express examples.

item.title: Cut AWS bills 35%: FinOps levers that work in 2026
item.description: Cut AWS bills 35% with FinOps levers that work in 2026 — Graviton3 Lambda, Compute Savings Plans with flexible targets, and the hidden refactor cost most teams miss.

item.title: 3 notification stacks that actually scale to WhatsApp
item.description: Cut notification costs 90% with the right stack — Courier vs Nhost vs AWS Pinpoint compared at 50k messages/month with WhatsApp compliance rules 2026

item.title: AWS IAM in 2 hours: no more policy hell
item.description: Cut IAM policy churn 76% with AWS Access Analyzer — permission boundaries, Terraform 1.9 snippets, and a GitHub Actions diff bot included

item.title: Next.js 15 vs Remix vs SvelteKit: 2026 choices
item.description: Cut 40 % latency on 3G: Next.js 15 vs Remix vs SvelteKit benchmarks with real deployments in Senegal, Kenya, and Nigeria — bundle sizes, Turbopack pitfalls, and the state-leak bug we chased for two days.

item.title: Build in public without burning out
item.description: Cut burnout 65% with controlled transparency — the real way to build in public in 2026 without the performance tax

item.title: Portfolio that hires: show constraints, not code
item.description: Portfolio that hires: show constraints, not code — median page load 320 ms on 3G, API p95 145 ms, $12/month. PortfolioOS template included.

item.title: Neon & PlanetScale: branch your DB like Git
item.description: Cut local DB setup from 2 hours to 5 minutes with Neon & PlanetScale branches — the real migration order and cache traps most teams miss in 2026
